meaning: 佩思郡[英国苏格兰原郡名]
examples: As daylight dwindles and temperatures drop in this forest in Perthshire, Scotland, beech trees (Fagus sylvatica) switch into power-saver mode.
The man accused of murdering a Perthshire pensioner has had three other charges against him dropped.
The team behind the restoration of a derelict Perthshire cinema has appointed a general manager.
Hopefully The Birks can bring a little magic to Aberfeldy and the whole of Highland Perthshire.
